title: hieracium gaudryi subsp. cernyanum
intro: Hieracium gaudryi subsp. cernyanum, also known as Hieracium cernyanum, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Hieracium cernyanum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
